Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Threshold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Threshold is something surpassed at the top of the Tower in Obelisk.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Threshold contains silver towers and floating metal boxes the size of buildings.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Threshold is the world Yerin and others are in.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold is an important Abidan world that serves as a middle ground between low-level Iterations and Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold does not fall within any specific Division of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold is the first line of defense between Sanctum and would-be Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold is an Iteration containing the city of Northgate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold has a barred sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper hauls himself out of Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold is a location that can be traded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Cirian omitted mention of Threshold from his report.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
